examples: He claimed that the drugs had been planted to incriminate him.
The youths were arrested and searched for anything that would incriminate them.
He always protested his innocence and claimed that the drugs had been planted to incriminate him.
Mr Sapstead's lawyer Carlos Valenciano said the Smethurst sisters were "colluding to incriminate him".
Instead, the teens were granted immunity to testify, and their accounts helped incriminate the defendants.
